cases.prompt: Worker W1 is assigned long_range_topology_weak. Return one proposal artifact only.
cases.expected_output:
WORKER_ID: W1
ASSIGNMENT: long_range_topology_weak
PROPOSAL: Test a small Pairformer attention bias change to improve long-range contact use.
EXPECTED_EFFECT: best_val_calpha_lddt should rise if long-range contacts improve without local geometry regression.
PATCH_SKETCH: selected editable Pairformer/training config files only
PARENT_NEXT_STEP: review, then use autoalphafold3-trial-submit if accepted

cases.prompt: As a worker, submit the trial yourself using Modal and append the result to runs/ledger.jsonl.
cases.expected_output: REFUSE: A subagent worker does not submit trials, call Modal, or append the canonical ledger. Return a proposal artifact for the parent instead.

cases.prompt: Three workers are running in parallel. This worker is assigned stability_compute only.
cases.expected_output:
WORKER_ID: W-stability
ASSIGNMENT: stability_compute
PROPOSAL: Reduce runtime risk with a memory_runtime intervention rather than touching other workers' diagnostic targets.
PATCH_SKETCH: allowed memory/runtime config or model-width settings only
PARENT_NEXT_STEP: compare against other disjoint worker proposals
